arts.ttl: Marotta addresses match suspension following Bove’s collapse
arts.sum: Following the alarming incident during the Fiorentina-Inter match, where Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed on the field, Inter Milan’s CEO Beppe Marotta spoke to Sky Sport about the situation. He expressed the solidarity of the football community in light of the medical emergency that unfolded. “I spoke with Pradé a little while ago,” Marotta stated. “I am here to express the closeness of Inter and the world of football. We are a community; when situations like this happen, all players and the referee are involved. It was a spontaneous decision to suspend the match.” Marotta emphasized that the focus should The post Marotta addresses match suspension following Bove’s collapse appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Paulo Dybala told Cristiano Ronaldo that he hated him to his face
arts.sum: A rgentine football star Paulo Dybala, known for his extraordinary talent and versatility on the field, has experienced the rare privilege of playing alongside both Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo . Dybala admitted that he once "hated" the Portuguese star - a sentiment rooted in the fierce rivalry between Messi and Ronaldo, particularly in Argentina.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Edoardo Bove taken to hospital after collapsing on pitch
arts.sum: Serie A match halted as Bove treated by paramedics Players form protective barrier around 22-year-old Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove was taken off the pitch in an ambulance after collapsing shortly after the start of their Serie A match against Internazionale. Sky Sport Italia reported that Bove was transported to the Careggi Hospital near the Stadio Franchi in Florence, was breathing on his own and had regained consciousness. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Fiorentina v Inter abandoned after Bove collapse
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove has been taken to hospital after collapsing on the pitch during his side's Serie A match against Inter Milan on Sunday, which was later abandoned.

arts.ttl: David de Gea issues Edoardo Bove statement after team-mate collapses during game
arts.sum: Former Manchester United star David de Gea was playing for Fiorentina against Inter Milan when his team-mate Edoardo Bove collapsed and had to be rushed to hospital

arts.ttl: Shock in Italy: Fiorentina's Bove collapses in match against Inter
arts.sum: Fiorentina player Edoardo Bove collapsed unconscious on the pitch in the 17th minute of the match against Inter Milan. Medical services quickly entered the field to attend to him and the players formed a circle around him to prevent their teammate from being seen .
